description: Canonical mapping from project_id to its photogrammetry GLB. Consumed by scripts/build_all.py and by Person 1's recommendation engine. Each entry's roof JSON is written to out/<project_id>.roof.json. v1.1 adds an optional `selection` block (M10) that narrows the auto pipeline to one customer's building inside a multi-building tile.

projects.label: Hamburg demo
projects.note: Real customer profile from projects_status_quo.csv. 4500 kWh/year, no existing solar, no EV.

selection.rationale: Targets the cluster of small tilted roofs near the tile origin (roof_8/9/10 in tile-wide output). Hand-tuned for residential-scale single-building output.

projects.label: Brandenburg demo
projects.note: Real customer profile from projects_status_quo.csv. 6000 kWh/year + EV (12000 km/year). Roof historically sold as 43 modules + 15 kWh battery.

selection.rationale: Centred on roof_5 (~45 panels in tile-wide output), closest to the historical 43-module sale.

gate_overrides.rationale: Brandenburg target sits on elevated terrain with no nearby lower vertices (the photogrammetry mesh has no ground samples within ~170m of the roof). Local-ground rejection is unreliable here; ROI selection alone is trusted.

projects.label: North Germany demo
projects.note: Showcase tile only — no real CSV project bound. Replace project_id with a real one once selected by the team.

projects.label: Ruhr demo
projects.note: Showcase tile only — no real CSV project bound. Replace project_id with a real one once selected by the team.
